output_schema.artifact_markdown: The adapted final LinkedIn post: channel-specific formatting, hook, structure, and call-to-action ready for publication
output_schema.resumo: 2-3 sentence summary of the final LinkedIn post adaptation
output_schema.self_check: Bullet list validating the post against evidence traceability, Wolven voice, LinkedIn structure, and acceptance criteria
output_schema.blocker_question: One highest-impact question when the argument is missing or insufficient; omitted when post is complete
